description: Apply full TabCoordinator tab management to twitter-dm and tiktok-dm: claim/release/heartbeat/session endpoints, /debug/eval, 30s global heartbeat interval, per-op claiming on Safari operations

features.name: twitter-dm (:3003): POST /api/debug/eval executes js string in tracked Safari tab and returns { result }
twitter-dm (:3003): 30s setInterval heartbeat refreshes all activeCoordinators entries and deletes stale ones
tiktok-dm (:3102): TabCoordinator imported, SERVICE_NAME='tiktok-dm', SERVICE_PORT=3102, activeCoordinators Map declared
tiktok-dm (:3102): GET /api/tabs/claims returns { claims: [], count: 0 } when no active claims
tiktok-dm (:3102): POST /api/tabs/claim with { agentId } claims tiktok.com tab and returns { ok: true, claim: { windowIndex, tabIndex } }
tiktok-dm (:3102): POST /api/tabs/release with { agentId } releases claim and returns { ok: true }
tiktok-dm (:3102): POST /api/tabs/heartbeat with { agentId } refreshes claim TTL and returns { ok: true, heartbeat: <timestamp> }
tiktok-dm (:3102): POST /api/debug/eval with { js } executes JS in tracked Safari tab and returns { result }
tiktok-dm (:3102): POST /api/messages/send-to and POST /api/prospect/discover wrapped with TabCoordinator claim/release
tiktok-dm (:3102): 30s setInterval heartbeat refreshes all activeCoordinators, deletes expired entries
npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck passes for both packages/twitter-dm and packages/tiktok-dm after all changes
